summary: Automated API Test Reporting feature fully verified. All 3 backend endpoints working (GET /api/admin/regression/latest, GET /api/admin/regression/history, POST /api/admin/regression/run). Frontend admin page at /admin/test-results displays correctly with 96 passed tests, status badge, run history table, and working Run Tests Now + Refresh buttons.

test_categories_covered.backend_api: 7/7 passed - latest endpoint, history endpoint, trigger run endpoint, data structure validation
test_categories_covered.frontend_ui: 9/9 passed - page load, passed count (96), status badge, duration, history table, Run Tests Now button, Refresh button, navigation link, button state change

critical_code_review_comments: All endpoints properly implemented with correct response structures
Frontend correctly uses data-testid attributes for testability
Toast notification shows when tests are triggered
Button state correctly changes to 'Running...' during test execution
seed_data_creation: None - used existing nightly test run data
context_for_next_testing_agent: API Test Reporting feature complete. Backend has 3 endpoints: /api/admin/regression/latest (returns latest test result), /api/admin/regression/history (returns run history), /api/admin/regression/run (triggers new test). Frontend page at /admin/test-results shows results with data-testid attributes for all key elements. Sidebar navigation includes 'API Test Results' link.
